5aHau4rMrAT.title: R1O if B
5aHau4rMrAT.head: What Happened?
prose: The plants produce an impressive number of fruit clusters. The greenhouse team notices the plants are consuming more water and nutrients than expected.

5bO2TaoJ94T.title: DI A
5bO2TaoJ94T.head: What Happened?
prose: The team secured additional water supplies to keep production levels high. Harvest volumes remained impressive, but rising costs significantly reduced the profitability of the project.

5cyxkHjCTzz.title: OC/RS A
5cyxkHjCTzz.head: What Happened?
prose: Demand surged beyond expectations, and your team moved quickly to scale production. Orders were filled, but the increased pace placed additional strain on resources and operations.

5gUnIsFxEij.title: OC/RS B
5gUnIsFxEij.head: What Happened?
prose: The cultivar met growing demand without overwhelming existing infrastructure, creating steady and sustainable momentum.

5iE252rdT5j.title: FOA A
5iE252rdT5j.head: What Happened?
prose: The outbreak is controlled, but treatment costs surge.

5ivVTJY5IZN.title: EvoReg if B
5ivVTJY5IZN.head: What Happened?
prose: Your team made the necessary adjustments to remain compliant while avoiding major disruptions. The transition was smooth, though it provided little competitive advantage.

5l789nIin0c.title: R2B if C
5l789nIin0c.head: What Happened?
prose: The cultivar redirects resources away from fruit production and toward survival. The greenhouse comfortably weathers the drought.

5ld30aDlsV2.title: EvoReg if C
5ld30aDlsV2.head: What Happened?
prose: The team postponed major changes to preserve short-term growth. The greenhouse now faces mounting pressure to address future compliance requirements.

5lsli9L72I8.title: Commercial Success
5lsli9L72I8.head: Commercial Success
prose: Production goals are being met Operations remain healthy The cultivar continues to perform consistently
Your cultivar achieved reliable commercial performance. While a few trade-offs limited its overall potential, it consistently met client expectations and earned a stable place in the market.

5lwT7JdVouY.title: R2 if B

choices.title: Keep maximizing yield
choices.desc: The market wants volume. We'll figure out the water issue later.

choices.title: Improve efficiency
choices.desc: Let's make the plant do more with less.

choices.title: Reduce production demands
choices.desc: A smaller harvest is better than an unsustainable one.

5lwT7JdVouY.head: Water Restrictions
prose: A regional drought causes water allocations to be reduced. Your high-yield cultivar consumes significantly more resources than expected. What do you do?

5mzQjCOdJSb.title: Water Reserves Critical

choices.title: Purchase Emergency Water
choices.desc: Protect production by securing additional resources.

choices.title: Reduce Harvest Targets
choices.desc: Scale back output to preserve the health of the cultivar.

choices.title: Improve Water Recycling
choices.desc: Invest in efficiency to make limited resources last longer.

5mzQjCOdJSb.head: Drought Intensifies
prose: Reservoir levels are falling, water prices have skyrocketed, and restrictions continue to tighten. Your team must decide how to protect the cultivar while managing increasingly scarce resources. What do you do?

5nbeEP2bmI1.title: TR if C
5nbeEP2bmI1.head: What Happened?
prose: Some production targets were sacrificed to reduce stress on the greenhouse. The slower pace gave researchers time to stabilize operations and reduce reliance on chemical treatments.

5nhVIrYx4lN.title: TR if A
5nhVIrYx4lN.head: What Happened?
prose: Researchers intensified treatment schedules to suppress the resistant fungus. The strong yield became increasingly dependent on costly interventions to maintain results.

5p0ZQ3SSdsN.title: R1O if A
5p0ZQ3SSdsN.head: What Happened?
prose: The plants shoot upward almost overnight. Investors are thrilled. Unfortunately, root development hasn't kept pace.

5rIC3xLMCMy.title: Outbreak Contained/Resource Stable

choices.title: Rapid Expansion
choices.desc: Scale production as fast as possible.

choices.title: Controlled Growth
choices.desc: Expand cautiously.

choices.title: Maintain Current Operations
choices.desc: Protect quality over quantity.

5rIC3xLMCMy.head: Market Demand Spike
prose: Industry demand unexpectedly doubles. Retailers want inventory immediately. What do you do?

5rJ0bLCdThd.title: END
5rJ0bLCdThd.head: Growth Doesn't Happen by Accident
prose: As a manager, you're not just solving today's problems. You're designing tomorrow's results.

Every choice you made changed the future of your cultivar. Some decisions created stronger roots . Some improved short-term performance . Others introduced trade-offs that didn't become visible until much later. Employee development works the same way. The skills you choose to develop today shape your team's performance tomorrow. Intentional development isn't about fixing everything at once. It's about making thoughtful decisions that build long-term success.

5tavaTv0Thh.title: R2A if C
5tavaTv0Thh.head: What Happened?
prose: The outbreak remains under control and growth targets are mostly maintained. However, treatment costs begin increasing and plants become more dependent on intervention.

5uS92ahSNpq.title: AEx if A
5uS92ahSNpq.head: What Happened?
prose: Your cultivar became the talk of the expo after demonstrating remarkable growth rates. Industry leaders took notice, and interest in the project increased dramatically.

5vFZaombXEb.title: Scenario Intro
prose: Your client wants a profitable, reliable cultivar. You have three development cycles before launch. Choose carefully.

5WpFBwpgchk.title: Cautionary Tale
5WpFBwpgchk.head: Cautionary Tale
prose: Production remains inconsistent Operating costs continue to rise The project is under review for future viability

Your cultivar showed early promise but struggled as new challenges emerged. Small development decisions accumulated over time, creating vulnerabilities that reduced long-term performance and market adoption.

5wQ1ZRV3SS8.title: EvoReg if A
5wQ1ZRV3SS8.head: What Happened?
prose: The team proactively upgraded systems and processes before the regulations took effect. The cultivar became a model for sustainable production practices.

5xepTGwEiUQ.title: DI B
5xepTGwEiUQ.head: What Happened?
prose: Production goals were lowered to preserve available resources. While overall output decreased, the cultivar remained healthy and capable of weathering the worsening drought.

5ZeEiIYlDzg.title: R2A if A
5ZeEiIYlDzg.head: What Happened?
prose: The cultivar continues to grow at record speed and early harvest numbers look promising. Unfortunately, the fungus spreads through several test plots before researchers can contain it.

61vYxqNXukm.title: R2C if C
61vYxqNXukm.head: What Happened?
prose: Researchers continue refining disease resistance and environmental tolerance. Investors remain skeptical, but the cultivar performs consistently under every test condition.

6aPoAUu1Mdr.title: DI C
6aPoAUu1Mdr.head: What Happened?
prose: Researchers invested in water reclamation and more efficient irrigation systems. The greenhouse adapted successfully to the drought and emerged more sustainable operating model.

6BbPuyLjkry.title: R2B if B
6BbPuyLjkry.head: What Happened?
prose: Researchers redesign irrigation systems and improve nutrient uptake. Production stabilizes despite reduced water availability.

6bJi2AX6aEA.title: AEx if B
6bJi2AX6aEA.head: What Happened?
prose: Visitors were impressed by the cultivar's production capacity and harvest potential. Several major buyers expressed interest, creating new opportunities for expansion.

6BvHUFxN02F.title: R2B if A
6BvHUFxN02F.head: What Happened?
prose: Production numbers remain impressive despite worsening drought conditions. The greenhouse begins burning through reserves at an alarming rate.

6CdTEvh4RJd.title: R2 if A

choices.title: Continue pushing growth
choices.desc: Demand is high. We can deal with the fungus later if we keep on schedule.

choices.title: Pause and strengthen defenses
choices.desc: A short delay now could prevent bigger losses later.

choices.title: Increase fungicide treatments
choices.desc: Let's keep growing while controlling the outbreak through intervention.

6CdTEvh4RJd.head: Fungal Outbreak
prose: A fast-spreading greenhouse fungus appears. Plants under stress are especially vulnerable. What do you do?

6dvSyNdn3wP.title: Rules
6dvSyNdn3wP.head: Your Mission
prose: You'll guide the development of a new plant cultivar through a series of choices and challenges. As conditions change, you'll need to decide what to prioritize, what to address next, and how to make the most of your limited opportunities to develop your plant. Choose carefully! Every decision has consequences, and the health of your cultivar depends on the strategy you build along the way.

6EucadbP3Pl.title: Fungal Infection Active

choices.title: Emergency Fungicide Campaign
choices.desc: Treat every greenhouse immediately.

choices.title: Remove Infected Plants
choices.desc: Accept short-term losses to protect the healthy crop.

choices.title: Launch Anyway
choices.desc: The client is expecting delivery. We can't delay.

6EucadbP3Pl.head: Humid Growing Season
prose: Unusually warm and humid weather creates ideal conditions for fungal spread. The outbreak threatens commercial launch. What do you do?

6FH2KnQPNQq.title: Breakthrough Cultivar
6FH2KnQPNQq.head: Breakthrough Cultivar
prose: Production exceeds forecasts Operating costs remain sustainable Greenhouse expansion has been approved

Your cultivar exceeded performance expectations. By balancing development decisions throughout the project, it proved highly productive, resilient, and adaptable under changing conditions, becoming a benchmark for future cultivars.

6FYLh10Bo5C.title: FOA C
6FYLh10Bo5C.head: What Happened?
prose: The launch proceeds, but infection spreads through customer greenhouses.

6GwOr2lmwsz.title: FOA B
6GwOr2lmwsz.head: What Happened?
prose: Several test plots are sacrificed, but the remaining crop is healthy.

6iQSWf2UOta.title: Sustainable/Stable

choices.title: Showcase Growth Speed
choices.desc: Highlight your cultivar's rapid development.

choices.title: Showcase Productivity
choices.desc: Emphasize exceptional harvest potential.

choices.title: Showcase Reliability
choices.desc: Promote consistent performance in any condition.

6iQSWf2UOta.head: National Agriculture Expo
prose: Your cultivar has been selected for a national agriculture expo. This is your opportunity to shape how buyers, researchers, and competitors from across the industry perceive your cultivar. What do you do?

6iX9XWpQhJy.title: Treatment Program

choices.title: Increase Treatment Frequency
choices.desc: Use more treatments to keep the fungus under control.

choices.title: Develop Natural Resistance
choices.desc: Invest in long-term protection by strengthening the cultivar.

choices.title: Accept Reduced Production
choices.desc: Lower output temporarily to reduce stress on the plants.

6iX9XWpQhJy.head: Treatment Resistance
prose: The fungus begins showing resistance to the chemical treatment program and researchers are concerned that the problem may continue to worsen. What do you do?

6jDSj42rGLW.title: R1O if C
6jDSj42rGLW.head: What Happened?
prose: Growth is slower than expected, but the plants develop extensive root systems. The greenhouse manager calls them "boringly reliable."

6jNi7WN9cXe.title: TR if B
6jNi7WN9cXe.head: What Happened?
prose: The team shifted its focus toward strengthening the cultivar's natural defenses. Progress slowed temporarily, but the plants gradually became resistant without constant treatment.

6K2QwSzhyvL.title: R2C if B
6K2QwSzhyvL.head: What Happened?
prose: The cultivar starts producing significantly larger harvests while maintaining its strong root structure. Customers begin taking notice.

6LxrYfTXBpJ.title: OC/RS C
6LxrYfTXBpJ.head: What Happened?
prose: While some sales opportunities were missed, the cultivar maintained excellent quality standards and reliable performance.

6PafegqZ92Y.title: R2 if C

choices.title: Accelerate Growth
choices.desc: We've built a strong foundation. It's time to speed things up.

choices.title: Increase Yield
choices.desc: Let's prove value through productivity instead of speed.

choices.title: Stay Focused on Resilience
choices.desc: The competitor is flashy. Reliability wins in the long run.

6PafegqZ92Y.head: Competitor Launch
prose: A rival company releases a cultivar that grows twice as fast as yours. Stakeholders are beginning to question your strategy. What do you do?

6UAHQ7pB98P.title: R2C if A
6UAHQ7pB98P.head: What Happened?
prose: The strong root systems allow growth rates to increase without major instability. The cultivar begins closing the gap with competitors.

6VlWoO0hMyp.title: R2A if B
6VlWoO0hMyp.head: What Happened?
prose: Growth slows while researchers focus on root health and disease resistance. The fungus is largely contained before significant losses occur.

6WkB2U8Tk18.title: Development Accelerated/Demand Increasing

choices.title: Invest Early
choices.desc: Prepare now to stay ahead of future requirements.

choices.title: Meet Minimum Requirements
choices.desc: Do what's required while minimizing disruption.

choices.title: Delay Compliance
choices.desc: Prioritize today's performance over tomorrow's changes.

6WkB2U8Tk18.head: Environmental Regulations
prose: New sustainability regulations will soon take effect. The greenhouse must decide how to respond while balancing future compliance with current production goals. What do you do?

6XLBUS4kU8s.title: AEx if C
6XLBUS4kU8s.head: What Happened?
prose: Instead of chasing headlines, your team highlighted the cultivar's consistent performance under challenging conditions, strengthening its long-term reputation.

6ZybzA6mKRm.title: R1

choices.title: Accelerate Growth
choices.desc: Researchers believe the plant could mature much faster.

choices.title: Increase Yield
choices.desc: Researchers have identified a way to produce significantly more fruit.

choices.title: Strengthen Resilience
choices.desc: Researchers recommend building stronger roots and disease resistance.

6ZybzA6mKRm.head: Early Development
prose: Your young cultivar is growing steadily, but initial testing reveals competing opportunities for improvement. What would you like to prioritize?
